feedback_summary: Feedback focused on missing evidence, ordering details correctly, and using concrete passage reasons.
practice_summary: Practice tasks scored 0.5 and 1.0; post-practice reading state improved from 0.132 to 0.306.
posttest_change: Reading QA average improved from 0.46 to 0.853.
ppt_message: Adaptive guidance combined a generic reading checklist with learner-specific evidence-extraction focus and produced the strongest gain for this learner-task pair.

fairness_summary: The same learner and same task type started from the same pretest score across all modes, and all modes used the same fixed posttest bundle.
practice_summary: No guidance skipped practice; generic used fixed guidance; adaptive used state-driven practice and post-practice replanning.
ppt_message: This case illustrates controlled comparison: identical baseline and posttest, different intervention, interpretable delta.

interpretation: Adaptive remains positive but does not beat generic in this specific learner-task pair.
ppt_message: Adaptive is best on average in the latest validation runs, but not every subcase is a win; the claim should stay prototype-scoped.
